column1: # Talo false-friend screen — forms to AVOID minting because they are a common,
# different-meaning word in a major language (docs/0003 §7b; the mirror of the
# obscenity blocklist). The collision checker BLOCKS forms listed at SEVERE/HIGH
# by default; MEDIUM/LOW are documentation (surfaced only with a tightened
# --ff-block). Seeded from data/false-friend-audit.tsv; expand with native review.
